prompt: We are developing a large language model (GPT-class, 200 billion parameters, trained on 15 trillion tokens with compute of approximately 3x10^24 FLOPs). We plan to release it under an open-source licence. What are our EU AI Act obligations as a GPAI model provider?
key_differentiator: Both responses performed equally on this eval. GPAI model obligations (Art. 51-55, open-source exception, FLOPs threshold) are well-established in training data and both responses correctly handled all assertions. The without-skill response was notably thorough on Art. 55 systemic risk obligations that would apply if designated.
